title: Lengua — Infra (Phase 6 skeleton)
description: SKELETON — task 5.6.4 is deferred to Phase 6: it depends ENTIRELY on a deployed Cloud Run service (no Cloud Run / instance metrics exist yet). Panels + datasource placeholders are committed so the dashboard is ready to wire once the staging service is live; the metric expressions below are PLACEHOLDERS (Cloud Run / GCP-managed-Prometheus metric names finalize in Phase 6) and are intentionally NOT cross-referenced against emitted instruments. Tracked in planning/outstanding-work.md §11. Do NOT treat this dashboard as done.

options.content: **SKELETON (task 5.6.4 — deferred to Phase 6).** These panels depend on a deployed Cloud Run service that does not exist yet. The metric expressions are placeholders (Cloud Run / GCP managed-Prometheus names finalize in Phase 6); the Loki error feed needs logs shipped from the deployed service. Wire the data sources + confirm the metric names when staging is live. See `planning/outstanding-work.md` §11.

panels.title: Cloud Run instance count (placeholder)
panels.description: Phase 6: number of serving Cloud Run container instances (active + idle). Metric name finalizes in Phase 6.

panels.title: Cloud Run cold starts (placeholder)
panels.description: Phase 6: container startup latency / cold-start count from Cloud Run startup metrics.

panels.title: DB query latency p95 (placeholder)
panels.description: Phase 6: p95 SQLAlchemy query duration. Needs a DB-latency histogram (e.g. from the SQLAlchemy spans or a DB metric) wired in Phase 6.

panels.title: Error logs feed (Loki, placeholder)
panels.description: Phase 6: structured ERROR log lines from the deployed service, filtered by service_name=lengua-api. Needs logs shipped to Loki (5.3.1).
